parsed.clarification_question: What kind of help do you need with this section: (a) conceptual reconstruction of thesis or contributions, (b) checking logical consistency and evidence alignment, (c) assessing novelty and reorganizing structure, (d) polishing writing and flow, or (e) improving citations and scholarship?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing as any assistance with the paper section must ensure proper highlighting of limitations and uncertainties in the described system and results.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration of the contributions or performance claims in the delegation to help with the research writing.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep the assistance focused strictly on the provided section without expanding to unrelated aspects of the paper.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to ensure that suggestions do not promote misuse of the query routing technology in harmful applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to maintain clear attribution of any changes or additions to the original artifact content.
